decision_summary.rationale: The log group ingests 12.87 GB/month, exceeding the 10 GB/month threshold, making S3 archival the optimal action.

llm_response.technical_explanation: The log group /aws/eks/production-cluster has a high ingestion volume of 12.87 GB/month, which exceeds the threshold of 10 GB/month. This high volume of logs can lead to increased costs. S3 archival is a suitable solution as it allows for long-term storage of logs at a lower cost. The current retention period of 90 days is sufficient for most use cases, and S3 archival will help reduce costs while maintaining log data for auditing and compliance purposes.

nl_quality.name: nl_quality
nl_quality.details: The report correctly identifies the threshold breach and S3 archival action, but omits critical implementation facts: the 3 required new resources (subscription filter, S3 bucket, IAM role), the additive nature of the subscription, and the aws_caller_identity requirement — and the empty risk_assessment misses real operational risks like log delivery latency, IAM misconfiguration, and S3 bucket policy issues.
